queueUaHint: Leave empty to inherit global UA
queueDeleteConfirmDesc: Delete queue "{name}"? Tasks in this queue will be moved to the Main Queue.
defaultQueueSettingDesc: Default queue for browser extension and new downloads
startIntoQueueTooltip: Starts into “{name}”; use the arrow to pick another queue
laterIntoQueueTooltip: Create without starting into “{name}”; use the arrow to pick another queue
queueScheduleDesc: Starts/stops the queue at the set times; times missed during sleep fire after waking the same day
queueTasksOrderHint: Tasks start in this order when the queue starts
queueNoPendingTasks: No pending tasks in this queue
scheduleSummaryBoth: Starts the queue at {start} and stops it at {stop}
scheduleSummaryStartOnly: Starts the queue at {start}; never auto-stops
scheduleSummaryStopOnly: Stops the queue at {stop}; never auto-starts
scheduleNeedOneTime: Set a start or stop time, otherwise the schedule does nothing
emptySubtitle: Click "New Download" or right-click to start
viewResetHint: View preferences are remembered per status tab
viewColumnsBudgetExceeded: Not enough width: remove another column, or close the detail panel
viewColumnHintCompactRow: Shown as the row's bottom bar in compact density
densityHintMessage: Lots of tasks — try compact density
boostBannerActive: ⚡ Boost: {fileName} — {count} task(s) will resume on completion
selectTaskHint: Select a task to view details
detailSegsSummary: {total} segments · {active} active · Dynamic split: on · Proactive split on slow segments + stuck rescue
detailQueueMoveHint: Moving a downloading task won't interrupt the current transfer — only its queue ownership changes. The destination queue's concurrency/speed limit/schedule take effect on the next start or resume.
detailLogHint: Only recent events recorded in this session are shown
editThreadsResetHint: A downloading task is paused and resumed automatically to apply the change immediately. Downloaded progress is fully preserved.
threadsChangeRejected: Cannot change the thread count of a completed task.
batchDownloadDesc: One URL per line, supports HTTP / FTP / Magnet
batchUrlPlaceholder:
One URL per line, e.g.:
https://example.com/file1.zip
https://example.com/file2.zip
magnet:?xt=urn:btih:...
importTxtNoUrls: No valid URLs found in file
btFileSelectDescSingle: This torrent contains 1 file. Confirm to start downloading.
btFileSelectDesc: This torrent contains {count} files. Select which files to download.
btResolveFailed: Failed to resolve magnet link: no metadata received (no peers or DHT blocked). The task was marked as error; you can retry it later from the task list.
btProbeError: Failed to parse torrent file; will retry after download starts
shutdownNeedActiveTask: Enable only while tasks are running
shutdownArmedHintImmediate: PC will shut down immediately after all downloads finish
shutdownArmedHint: PC will shut down {m} min after all downloads finish
settingsCatApiServiceDesc: Browser takeover, aria2 RPC compatibility & management API
accountHeroSubtitle: Sign in to use cloud features like settings sync; stay signed out to keep everything local with zero account requests
accountCloudFeaturesDesc: All off by default; enable each explicitly after signing in
accountFeatureConfigSyncDesc: Sync settings and themes across devices
accountFeatureMultiDeviceDesc: Discover and connect devices, push download tasks, track progress and retrieve files
accountLoginTerms: By signing in you agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
accountDeviceVerifySubtitle: This device hasn't signed in before. Enter the code sent to {email} to trust it.
accountDeviceVerifySubtitleGeneric: This device hasn't signed in before. Enter the code sent to your account's email to trust it.
accountRegisterVerifySubtitle: We sent a code to {email}. Enter it to finish creating your account.
accountErrorRateLimited: Too many requests, please try again later
accountErrorRegistrationIncomplete: Registration isn't finished yet — please verify your email to continue
accountErrorValidation: Please check your email and use a password with at least 8 characters
accountErrorNetwork: Network request failed, please check your connection or server address
accountErrorUnknown: Something went wrong, please try again
accountDeviceDeleteConfirmDesc: The device will need to verify its email again before it can sign in.
accountDeviceDeleteCurrentWarning: This is the device you're using now — you'll be signed out immediately.
accountDevicesDesc: Manage devices trusted with this account; deleted devices require email verification again
accountServerAddressDesc: FluxCloud service address; changes take effect immediately
accountServerAddressInvalid: Please enter a valid address starting with http:// or https://
cloudSyncDesc: Automatically sync appearance, general, download and BT/ED2K settings across signed-in devices
cloudSyncErrorDeviceLimit: Sync device limit reached for your plan. Sign out on another device and try again.
cloudSyncErrorDeviceUntrusted: This device is not trusted for sync. Please sign in again.
cloudSyncErrorNetwork: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
autoStartupDesc: Automatically run FluxDown on system startup
closeToTrayDesc: Hide to system tray instead of quitting when closing
startMinimizedToTrayDesc: App starts hidden in the system tray
floatingBallDesc: Always-on-top desktop widget showing speed & progress; drag URLs or torrents onto it to create tasks
floatingBallActiveOnlyDesc: Show the floating ball only when downloads are active; hide it otherwise
floatingBallWaylandUnsupported: Your desktop session (Wayland) does not allow positioned always-on-top windows, so the floating ball is unavailable. Alternatives enabled: the tray shows live speed, and copied URLs are auto-filled into the download dialog when you open the main window. Add local files (incl. .torrent) from the main window or by double-clicking them.
clipboardWatchDesc: Watch the clipboard for download URLs while the main window is hidden (availability depends on desktop environment)
clipboardUrlDetectedBody: Click to create a download task
torrentFileAssociationDesc: Set FluxDown as the default app for .torrent files
torrentAssocDialogDesc:
Set FluxDown as the default app for .torrent files?
Double-click a torrent file to start downloading directly.
notifyOnCompleteDesc: Show a system notification when a task completes. When disabled, no completion notifications will be shown
silentDownloadDesc: Start external downloads (e.g. from the browser extension) immediately with default settings, without showing the confirmation dialog
useServerTimeDesc: Set the modified time of completed files to the server-provided original time (Last-Modified) instead of the download completion time
keepAwakeWhileDownloadingDesc: Prevent the system from sleeping or turning off the display while downloads are active. Restores automatically when done
analyticsEnabledDesc: Help improve FluxDown by sending anonymous usage data. No personal or sensitive data is collected
sidebarVisibilityDesc: Choose which sections to show in the sidebar
showSidebarStatusDesc: Show status filter section in sidebar
titlebarButtonsDesc: Choose which tool buttons to show in the titlebar; right-click a button to hide it
showTitlebarPauseAllDesc: Show pause all button in the titlebar
showTitlebarResumeAllDesc: Show resume all button in the titlebar
showTitlebarSettingsDesc: Show settings button in the titlebar
showTitlebarThemeDesc: Show theme toggle button in the titlebar
customCategoriesDesc: Create custom file categories, match by extension or regex
deleteCategoryConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this category? Downloaded files are not affected.
extensionsHint: Comma separated, e.g. epub, mobi, azw3
categorySaveDirDesc: Leave empty to use global default
resetAllCategoriesConfirm: Reset all categories to defaults? Custom categories will be removed and built-in categories will be restored to their initial configuration.
categoryPriorityNote: Custom categories take priority over built-in ones. Use arrows to reorder.
autoStartupFailedDesc: Failed to modify startup setting. Please check system permissions.
themeModeDesc: Choose light, dark, or follow system
appIconDesc: Customize the icon used by the window, taskbar and tray
defaultSaveDirDesc: Default save location for new downloads
rememberLastSaveDirDesc: Use the last download location as the default for new downloads instead of the fixed directory
defaultThreadsDesc: Per-task connection cap; the downloader ramps up gradually based on server behaviour
autoMaxConnectionsDesc: Maximum connections the auto scheduler may use when threads are set to Auto
connPolicyCacheDesc: After a server rejects parallel connections (403/429), its cap is remembered for 24h; clear to relearn if the limit was lifted
autoRetryCountDesc: Number of automatic retries after transient errors (e.g. network drops)
autoRetryDelayDesc: Seconds to wait before each auto-retry (increases per attempt)
proxySettingsDesc: Configure network proxy for HTTP/FTP downloads
proxyNoListDesc: Addresses that bypass proxy, comma separated
proxyBtNote: Proxy is not supported for BitTorrent downloads
userAgentDesc: Browser identity used in download requests.
userAgentPlaceholder: Leave empty for default identity FluxDown/<version>
userAgentTaskPlaceholder: Leave empty to use global setting
revealFileCmdDesc: Third-party file manager command used to open files/folders. Placeholders: {path} = current path (a downloaded file uses its full path — most managers locate and select it; for a directory it is the folder path), {dir} = directory (parent dir for files). Leave empty to use the platform default (Explorer / Finder / Nautilus, etc.).
taskProxyDesc: Use a separate proxy for this task (empty = use global)
taskProxyFormatHint:
Supported proxy formats:

Without auth:
  http://host:port
  socks5://host:port

With username & password:
  http://user:pass@host:port
  socks5://user:pass@host:port

Supported types: http / https / socks4 / socks5
Leave empty to use global proxy settings
taskIgnoreTlsErrorsDesc: Allows expired, self-signed, or mismatched certificates for this task only. This may expose the download to interception.
taskCookieDesc: Used for downloads requiring login (empty = none)
taskCookieBatchDesc: Batch: empty = each item keeps its own captured cookies; filled = overrides all
taskChecksumDesc: Verify file integrity after download (empty = skip)
taskHeadersDesc: Add extra HTTP headers for this task (use the Cookie field above for cookies)
apiServiceEnableDesc: Start the local HTTP API service (127.0.0.1 only) used by the feature toggles below
apiServiceTokenDesc: Access token for API requests; type your own or click Generate for a random one. Required once the management API is enabled
apiServiceTokenClearConfirmDesc: The management API is enabled and depends on this token. Clearing it will also turn off the management API. Continue?
apiServiceFeaturesDesc: Control which API surface each module exposes (disabled when the master switch is off)
apiServiceTakeoverDesc: Lets the FluxDown userscript take over browser downloads
apiServiceScriptCopied: Script copied; paste it into a new Tampermonkey script
apiServiceJsonrpcDesc: Implements the aria2 JSON-RPC protocol for "send to aria2" scripts or clients like AriaNg
apiServiceApiDesc: HTTP API for querying and controlling tasks, for MCP servers and automation scripts (authentication required)
apiServiceMcpDesc: Exposes a Model Context Protocol endpoint for AI clients like Claude Desktop, Cursor, and Cline (shares the Management API token, authentication required)
btEnableDhtDesc: Distributed Hash Table for trackerless peer discovery
btEnableUpnpDesc: Auto-configure router port forwarding for better connectivity
btListenPortDesc: Port range for incoming BT connections
btTrackerListDesc: Tracker servers for peer discovery, one URL per line
btTrackerPlaceholder:
One tracker URL per line, e.g.:
udp://tracker.opentrackr.org:1337/announce
https://tracker.example.com/announce
btTrackerSubDesc: Periodically fetch up-to-date trackers from community-maintained lists, merged and deduplicated with the list above
btTrackerSubPlaceholder:
One subscription URL per line, e.g.:
https://trackerslist.com/best.txt
https://ngosang.github.io/trackerslist/trackers_best.txt
ed2kSettingsDesc: Configure eD2K servers and server.met subscription
ed2kServerListDesc: Manually configured eD2K servers (for finding sources), merged and deduplicated with the subscription list
ed2kServerSubDesc: Periodically fetch up-to-date servers from community-maintained server.met lists, merged and deduplicated with the list above
ed2kEnableKadDesc: Find sources via the decentralized Kad network, works even when all servers are down
ed2kEnableUpnpDesc: Auto-map ports via UPnP to obtain HighID, connecting to more peers and receiving callbacks
ed2kListenPortDesc: eD2K client TCP/UDP listen port (0 = auto-select)
ed2kServerSubPlaceholder:
One server.met URL per line, e.g.:
http://upd.emule-security.org/server.met
https://www.shortypower.org/server.met
filePickerErrorTimeout:
Directory picker timed out, please try again.
If a file picker window opened in the background, close it first.
filePickerErrorNoTool:
No system file picker found.
Install xdg-desktop-portal-gtk (recommended) or zenity / kdialog:
sudo pacman -S xdg-desktop-portal-gtk or sudo apt install xdg-desktop-portal-gtk
filePickerErrorNative: Failed to open file picker dialog, please try again.
filePickerErrorGeneric: Failed to open file picker, please try again.
btSettingsRestartHint: Some settings require BT engine restart to take effect
autoCheckUpdateDesc: Automatically check for updates on startup
updateChannelDesc: Frontier delivers preview builds ahead of stable — may be unstable
donateBody: Since {date}, FluxDown has shipped {releases} releases with over {commits} commits — always free, with zero ads and zero tracking. Ongoing development relies on your support and feedback.
donateThanks: Your support helps FluxDown keep improving. Thank you so much!
updatePromptBody: Version v{v} is available ({size}). Update now?
updateFallbackTaskCreated: Added the update to the download list
logExportDesc: Export logs to attach when submitting feedback
logMaxSizeDesc: Oldest logs are cleaned automatically when total size exceeds the limit
changelogSubtitle: FluxDown v{v} is out. Here's what's new:
feedbackDesc: Share your thoughts to help improve FluxDown
feedbackContactHint: Enter your email to receive progress notifications. Other contact methods may not receive notifications.
feedbackSysInfoHint: The app version and system info above are sent with your feedback to help diagnose issues. No personal or sensitive data is included.
feedbackAttachLogsHint: Include today's logs (sanitized) to help us diagnose the issue faster
feedbackError: Submission failed, please try again later
feedbackRateLimited: Too many requests, please try again later
hlsQualityDesc: Multiple quality options detected. Choose the one to download
resolveVariantDesc: Multiple download formats detected. Choose the one to download
mobileFileNotFound: File not found — it may have been moved or deleted
mobileNoAppToOpen: No app can open this file
mobileFooter: FluxDown · No ads · No tracking · Local-first
mobilePickDirUnmappable: Couldn't resolve the folder; pick one on device storage
mobileAllFilesDesc: Saving to public folders (e.g. Download) requires the "All files access" permission. Tap "Grant" to enable it in system settings.
deleteConfirmDescWithFile: Delete "{fileName}" and its downloaded file? This cannot be undone.
deleteConfirmDescKeepFile: Delete "{fileName}"? The downloaded file will be kept on disk.
batchDeleteConfirmDescWithFile: Delete {count} selected tasks and their files? This cannot be undone.
batchDeleteConfirmDescKeepFile: Delete {count} selected tasks? Downloaded files will be kept on disk.
pluginDepsMissingBody: The plugin was installed, but its declared capabilities depend on components that are not installed yet: {components}. Those features stay unavailable until the components are set up. Go to component settings now?
pluginDetailSettingsCount: {count} field(s), configurable from the plugin card after install
pluginPermFfmpegDesc: Runs FFmpeg for audio/video processing (mux/transcode); requires the FFmpeg component
pluginPermYtdlpDesc: Runs yt-dlp to extract direct media URLs; requires the yt-dlp and FFmpeg components
pluginPermUnknownDesc: Unknown permission (not supported by this version)
pluginDetailUsageBody: Plugins are enabled by default after install and can be toggled in the Installed list at any time. Resolver plugins run automatically before matching downloads start — no manual action needed. Plugins with settings can be configured via the gear button on their card. A plugin that keeps failing is auto-disabled by the circuit breaker. Visit the plugin homepage for detailed usage.
pluginHelperScriptCopied: Script copied. Paste and run it in the site's DevTools console
taskIgnorePluginRetryMsg: This task failed while a plugin was resolving it. Ignoring will skip the plugin and retry with the original link directly. If this keeps happening, check the plugin's settings under Settings → Extensions → Plugins.
pluginAutoDisabledToast: Plugin "{name}" was auto-disabled after repeated failures. Re-enable it from Settings → Extensions → Plugins.
componentsFfmpegDesc: Open-source audio/video toolkit. FluxDown uses it to merge separate audio and video tracks from DASH and similar streaming downloads.
componentsYtdlpDesc: Media extractor. FluxDown plugins use it to pull direct media URLs from 1000+ sites (YouTube, etc.) for the download engine.
componentsStatusNotFound: {name} not found. Install it below or specify a path manually.
componentsStatusNotFoundUnsupported: {name} not found. Add it to your system PATH or specify a path manually below.
componentsManagedUnsupported: Managed install isn't available on this platform (e.g. Alpine/OpenWrt musl libc). Use a {name} from your system package manager / PATH, or set a manual path above.
componentsManualPathDesc: Point directly to a {name} executable; takes priority over the managed install and system PATH.
componentsInstallSectionDescFfmpeg: Downloads a static FFmpeg build from the official BtbN/FFmpeg-Builds release on demand — not bundled with the installer.
componentsInstallSectionDescYtdlp: Downloads the official platform binary from the yt-dlp/yt-dlp GitHub release on demand — not bundled with the installer.
componentsUninstallConfirmMsg: This removes the managed {name} build. Manual and system-PATH {name} are not affected.
manifestDialogDesc: This link contains {count} files. Choose what to download.
manifestSuggestionText: Looks like an episode set: suggest selecting the main videos + matching subtitles ({count} items)
manifestQualityFallbackHint: {count} items have no exact match; using the closest available quality
groupMemberExpiredResolve: Direct link expired · will re-resolve automatically on next launch ↻
groupDetailLazyRenewHint: Lazy renewal: link re-resolves automatically on every launch
